title: Good links: 17 March 2024
summary: Why I’m Ready to Party Like It’s 1999…Again - Jared White reflects on his early experiences of the web, and suggests maybe we’re ready to do the 90s web again…
content: • Why I’m Ready to Party Like It’s 1999…Again - Jared White reflects on his early experiences of the web, and suggests maybe we’re ready to do the 90s web again…
